_comment: Sample email header payloads for testing the phishing detection workflow. Use these to verify the IF node routing before connecting live credentials.

high_risk_spoofed._comment: Should trigger Slack alert — SPF fail, DKIM fail, suspicious sender
high_risk_spoofed.subject: Urgent: Verify your account immediately

critical_risk_executive_impersonation._comment: Should trigger Slack alert — display name matches CEO, domain mismatch
critical_risk_executive_impersonation.subject: Wire transfer required — confidential

low_risk_legitimate._comment: Should be silently ignored — all headers pass, known sender
low_risk_legitimate.subject: Q2 report attached

medium_risk_newsletter._comment: Should be silently ignored — minor signals, not actionable
medium_risk_newsletter.subject: Your weekly digest
